No dynamic or untrusted data is processed.\n- **Sinks & Flows:** No data flows involving untrusted input; the code only defines ABI and provides connection methods.\n- **Anomalies & Analysis:** No signs of malicious code, obfuscation, secrets, or suspicious behaviors. It is a standard interface wrapper.\n- **Conclusion & Confidence:** The report correctly identifies this as benign, with high confidence and zero malware or security risk.\n\n**Verdict:** No issues, code is benign and standard.\n\n---\n\n**Report 2:**\n\n- **Purpose & Sources:** Similar to Report 1—factory class for interacting with a Uniswap V2 Pair contract, using static ABI and ethers.js.\n- **Sinks & Flows:** The connect method could be misused if connected to malicious contracts, but the code itself does not process untrusted data.\n- **Anomalies & Analysis:** No dynamic code, obfuscation, secrets, or suspicious patterns. The code is a typical autogenerated interface.\n- **Conclusion & Confidence:** The report correctly states the code is standard and benign, with very high confidence.
